overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a luxury cyberpunk penthouse apartment from Cyberpunk 2077. The clip begins with a balcony view of Night City at dusk, then moves through an opulent art deco interior featuring neon lighting, champagne bars, and a holographic news terminal before ending in a neon-lit back corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury penthouse balcony overlooking cyberpunk cityscape

events.description: moves from outdoor balcony into the interior penthouse space through large open doorway

agents.ego_description: walking from the balcony into the luxury penthouse interior while observing the city view

entered.detail: dense cyberpunk cityscape with neon-lit towers and holographic billboards against dusk sky
dark metal railing with concrete top edge framing the city view
tattered green fabric awning hanging from the balcony structure
industrial metal scaffolding structure on the balcony edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a high-rise balcony overlooking a sprawling cyberpunk metropolis at dusk. The camera moves forward from the balcony railing toward the interior, passing industrial scaffolding and hanging fabric, then transitions through a large opening into the luxury penthouse while the futuristic city skyline remains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury lounge with champagne bar and art deco seating

events.description: transition from natural dusk light to warm golden interior artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: moving through the lounge area past the bar setup with champagne glasses and gold-accented furniture

entered.detail: round glass table with multiple champagne flutes and bottles arranged for service
tall structural pillars with gold and black geometric art deco patterns
modern black leather seating with gold trim and clean lines
wall featuring vertical gold lighting strips and warm ambient glow

segments.scene_description: Having entered the penthouse, the camera moves through a lavish lounge area with art deco styling. A table with champagne glasses sits prominently in the foreground while gold-accented pillars and walls create a warm, luxurious atmosphere. The city skyline remains visible through the large opening to the left as the lighting shifts to interior sources.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand art deco corridor with dramatic ceiling chandeliers

agents.ego_description: walking down the long grand corridor with circular ceiling lights and geometric wall patterns

entered.detail: series of large circular ring chandeliers with warm lighting hanging from the ceiling
long black counter with gold trim and modern design
geometric metal wall decorations with backlighting creating dramatic shadows

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds down an impressive corridor defined by massive circular chandeliers that recede into the distance. Art deco geometric patterns adorn the walls with subtle backlighting, while a reception desk runs along the right side. The space feels expansive and cathedral-like with its high ceiling and dramatic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: main bar area with holographic computer terminal

events.description: approaches and examines the holographic computer screen displaying Night City News interface

agents.ego_description: approaching the bar counter to examine the holographic news terminal with green-tinted display

entered.detail: long polished black counter surface with papers and items scattered on top
large curved holographic display showing green-tinted Night City News interface with text and images
tall ornate metal window frames with intricate geometric patterns allowing light through

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the main bar area, focusing on a holographic computer terminal displaying green-tinted news content. The bar counter stretches across the scene with art deco window frames visible in the background. The lighting mixes warm interior sources with the cool green glow of the screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit lounge seating area behind the bar

events.description: lighting dims significantly as moving away from the terminal into darker lounge areas

agents.ego_description: moving through the darker lounge area away from the bar counter into shadowed spaces

entered.detail: shadowed seating areas and furniture barely visible in the low light conditions

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the illuminated terminal, the scene transitions into much darker lounge areas where furniture becomes barely visible in the shadows. The bar counter recedes to the left as the camera progresses through the dimly lit space, creating a moody, mysterious atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: back bar corridor with purple neon lighting and bottle display

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow back corridor illuminated by purple neon strips and bottle displays

entered.detail: bright purple LED light strips running along the wall and ceiling edges
wall covered with illuminated glass bottles and shelving with various colored lights

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a narrow back corridor defined by vibrant purple neon lighting. A wall of illuminated bottles creates a colorful display on the right, while the purple strips provide the primary light source. The space feels more intimate and enclosed compared to the grand corridors earlier, ending the tour through the penthouse's service areas.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sprawling high-rise balcony into the depths of an opulent cyberpunk penthouse, transitioning from a vast urban vista to an intimate, neon-lit corridor. It begins by moving from the balcony railing past industrial scaffolding and hanging fabric, crossing the threshold into a lavish art deco lounge where the dusk skyline fades as warm interior lighting and gold-accented pillars take over. The camera then proceeds through an expansive, cathedral-like corridor defined by receding circular chandeliers and geometric wall patterns before arriving at a bar area dominated by the cool green glow of a holographic news terminal. As the camera moves away from the terminal, the environment shifts into moody, shadowed lounge areas where the furniture disappears into darkness. Finally, the space narrows into a dimly lit back corridor illuminated by vibrant purple neon strips and a colorful wall of glowing bottles.
